statement.en: Mitochondrial biogenesis and pathway activation during follicular lymphoma transformation to diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is context-impossible to evaluate. It presents only a title, author, date, and embargo notice with no accessible abstract or thesis content. No claims, data, methods, or results are available for truth-value assessment. The categorization as 'cs.AI' appears misaligned with the biological title. The embargo status renders the axiom non-evaluable in the present state.
